value.caption:
What started as a journey to support and empower women in Iten is now growing into something much bigger 💜

Today, we are proud to officially introduce Tulizo Foundation — a movement dedicated to creating safe spaces, empowering women and girls, supporting athletes, and bringing conversations around gender equality and gender-based violence into the wider community.

Through sport, education, mentorship, school outreach, and community engagement, we hope to create long-term positive change where it matters most — at the grassroots level.

We are also incredibly grateful to officially partner with the ASICS Foundation as we begin this journey together. This partnership gives us hope, strength, and the opportunity to expand our postive  impact within the community.

This is only the beginning. 🌍✨

#TulizoFoundation #RunForChange #CommunityImpact #WomenEmpowerment #Iten GenderEquality SafeSpaces ASICSFoundation

🎥 🥰 @the.adventure.bakery

value.caption:
Tulizo Foundation Community Workshop – 13th June

We came together to discuss and  raise awareness, share experiences, and explore ways to create safer and more inclusive communities on matters of Gender based Violence . Thank you to everyone who participated and contributed to this important conversation.
 #TulizoFoundation #CommunityEmpowerment #buildingstrongcommunities

value.caption:
At Crown Academy, we had the privilege of engaging with students under the theme “Gender Equality.”

Our message was simple but powerful: every girl deserves an equal opportunity to learn, grow, dream, and succeed. When girls are given the chance, the support, and the confidence to pursue their goals, there is no limit to what they can achieve.

Through meaningful conversations, encouragement, and shared experiences, we reminded the students that gender should never define their potential. Together, we can build communities where every child—girl or boy—is respected, valued, and empowered to reach their full potential. 

Thank you our stakeholders and Tulizo Team . Pamoja Tunaweza! 

📸 @gui_crnlp
